Headline: #119 Michigan/119th Temporary Reroute at 119th/Normal
ShortDescription: #119 Michigan/119th buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions via 119th, Halsted, 115th, Wentworth and 119th due to construction near 119th/Normal.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
How does this affect my trip?

#119 Michigan/119th buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions via 119th, Halsted, 115th, Wentworth and 119th, then will resume their normal route.

Allow extra travel time.

Why is service being changed?

Buses are rerouted due to construction near 119th/Normal.

Headline: #22 Clark and #152 Addison Temporary Reroute near Clark/Addison
ShortDescription: 22 Clark and 152 Addison buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions due to street blockage near Clark/Addison.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#22 Clark and #152 Addison buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions due to street blockage near Clark/Addison.

#22 Clark buses will operate via Clark, Racine, Belmont, then resume their normal route on Clark.

#152 Addison buses will operate via Addison, Racine, Belmont, Halsted, then resume their normal route on Addison.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: Kimball-bound Brown Line Service Delayed at Damen
ShortDescription: Kimball-bound Brown Line trains are standing at Damen due to a sick passenger. Crews working to restore service.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Kimball-bound Brown Line trains are standing at Damen due to a sick passenger. 

Personnel are working to restore service. Allow extra travel time.
